description_long: This cabinetry ensemble features a pastel blue kitchen unit with both upper and lower cabinets, some with glass-front doors and others with solid panels, all accented by gold-colored handles and hinges. The upper section includes open shelving and a display area for dishes and teapots, while the lower section has multiple drawers and doors, some of which are open to reveal interior shelving and cookware. Adjacent to the cabinetry is a wooden worktable with a butcher block top, a cup, and a metal container, as well as a wall-mounted utensil rack holding various kitchen tools and pots. The cabinetry is set against a white wall and stands on a checkered beige and white tile floor, evoking a classic kitchen scene. The overall design is functional and visually appealing, with a blend of open and closed storage options. The materials and finishes suggest a sturdy, practical construction suitable for urban kitchens or communal spaces.
description: A pastel blue kitchen cabinetry set with upper and lower cabinets, gold hardware, and an adjacent wooden worktable, all set on a checkered tile floor with wall-mounted utensils.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cabinetry set, open doors and drawers, visible dishes, cookware, and the adjacent worktable with utensils and kitchen tools.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinetry and worktable, with open cabinet doors extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain white back panel of the cabinetry, with no visible features or details.
description_view_3: Angled side view focusing on the worktable, utensil rack, and the side profile of the cabinetry with open doors.
attribute_cabinet_type: kitchen base and wall cabinet set
attribute_door_configuration: combination of single door, double door, and open shelf
